description_long: This is a rectangular billiard table with a green felt playing surface, surrounded by a light wood frame and black corner accents. The table features six visible pocket openings, one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side, all outlined in black. The playing surface is marked with a white dividing line and is set up for a game, with a white cue ball and a neatly racked triangle of colored balls. The legs are robust, made of the same light wood as the frame, and are reinforced with horizontal supports for stability. The rail cushions are black and appear to be made of a durable, slightly textured material, providing bounce for the balls. The overall design is clean and modern, with no visible branding or decorative elements beyond the functional features.
description: A rectangular billiard table with a green felt surface, light wood frame, black rail cushions, and six pocket openings. The table is set up for play with a cue ball and racked balls, and features sturdy wooden legs.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the green felt playing surface, white dividing line, racked balls, cue ball, and all six pocket openings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden frame, black rail cushion, and the profile of the sturdy wooden legs.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the full structure of the four wooden legs and their connecting supports, with no playing surface visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the frame, rail cushion, and leg profile from the other side.
attribute_pocket_openings: Six open pocket openings, one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side, all circular and outlined in black. Corner pockets are slightly larger than side pockets.
attribute_rail_cushions: Rail cushions are black, likely rubber, with a flat profile and no visible markings or branding. They appear to be in good condition, with a simple, modern style and no visible wear.
attribute_leg_design: Four thick, rectangular wooden legs arranged at the corners, each with a horizontal support connecting to the table base. The legs are plain with no decorative elements.
attribute_felt_covering: The felt covering is green, smooth, and appears to be in excellent condition with no visible seams, wear, or branding. The texture is standard for billiard tables.
